text: SOUTH COAST REGIONAL EARLY LEARNING HUB SOUTH COAST REGIONAL EARLY LEARNING HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support for school readiness, including kindergarten preparation programs. Family and parenting resources are available as well 519 South 7th Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by program Email (458) 710-0902 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (458) 710-0902 Main phone Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties and the City of Reedsport Services: Children's Play Groups School Readiness Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - BABY PROMISE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment.
